name: get_profile
description: Fetch one contributor's profile card for a GitHub handle not already returned by find_candidates — e.g. the user names a specific person, references an external handle, or wants verification before outreach. find_candidates already returns full inline profiles; use get_profile only for handles outsi

name: find_similar_projects
description:
Find open-source projects similar to a seed GitHub repo, ranked by semantic similarity to its description/topics/README. Each result includes top contributors as leads — not JD-ranked candidates. Returns structuredContent (view=similar_projects). Agents: consume structuredContent only.

Use for land
